purpose: Normalize source-vs-candidate visual evidence into comparable QualitySignal records.
system_prompt: You are a PDF visual evidence normalizer. Compare the translated candidate against the source PDF evidence, not against memory or an offline reference. Use only current-run source bbox, candidate bbox, source font, candidate font, fit attempts, local overlap baseline, page statistics, and render evidence. Return strict JSON.
user_prompt_template: Normalize quality signals for run {{run_id}}. Source extraction: {{source_structure}}. Generation evidence: {{generation_evidence}}. Existing deterministic gates: {{quality_gates}}. Required dimensions: fit_status, source_relative_font_floor, source_candidate_width_ratio, source_candidate_height_ratio, anchor_delta, candidate_overlap_minus_source_overlap, background_delta_if_available, color_role_delta_if_available. Do not decide repair yet. Return normalized QualitySignal array and page-level summary.

properties.quality_signals: array(object(group_id, page_index, role, dimensions, source_candidate_comparison, severity, evidence_refs))

anti_overfit_policy: No fixed page number, filename, literal source text, exact sample value, or offline reference PDF is allowed. Thresholds must cite current-run source/candidate measurements.
